title: psydrax odoratus subsp. buxifolius
intro: Psydrax odoratus subsp. buxifolius, also known as the 'Kayan' or 'Mountain Box', is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Psydrax odoratus subsp. buxifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe wounds, making it a valuable resource for natural medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
